perks.name: Bestial Strength
perks.description: You can feel how your muscles become stronger when changing into your werewolf form. Then, they grant you a slight damage bonus.

perks.name: Bestial Strength
perks.description: You can feel how your muscles become even stronger when being a werewolf, granting you a moderate damage bonus.

perks.name: Bestial Strength
perks.description: Your muscles are almost as hard as steel in your werewolf form, granting you a significant damage bonus.

perks.name: Bestial Strength
perks.description: There remains not much that is not torn to pieces by your brute strength in werewolf form.

perks.name: Bury the Beast
perks.description: You are able to control your inner beast, therefore you are no longer forced to transform at night.

perks.name: Wolf Among Men
perks.description: You learned how to blend in perfectly. Silver Hand Elite werewolf hunters are less likely to hunt you.

perks.name: Animal Vigor
perks.description: Your werewolf form grants you even more physical strength and increases both your endurance and your resistance to wounds.

perks.name: Roadkill
perks.description: Leap attacks (two-handed sprinting power attacks) in beast form do a critical strike equal to your Stamina and throw targets.

perks.name: Rampage
perks.description: Beast form lasts 50% longer and feeding extends the duration 50% more.

perks.name: Totem of Terror
perks.description: Your Werewolf Howl of Terror strikes fear into even more terrible foes.

perks.name: Totem of Terror
perks.description: Your Werebeast Howl of Terror is even more terrifying, increasing the duration by 100%.

perks.name: Totem of the Hunt
perks.description: Your Werebeast Howl of the Hunt shatters locks up to Adept level at close range.

perks.name: Totem of the Hunt
perks.description: Your Werebeast Howl of the Hunt shatters locks up to Expert level at close range.

perks.name: Totem of Ice Brothers
perks.description: Your Werewolf Totem of Brotherhood Howl is now able to call Ice Wolves to your aid.

perks.name: Totem of Ice Brothers
perks.description: Your Totem of Brotherhood Howl can now call your werewolf brethren to your aid.

perks.name: Supernatural Strength
perks.description: Back hand attacks (two-handed standing power attacks) in beast form disarm targets.

perks.name: Infinite Duress
perks.description: Frenzy attacks (one-handed standing power attacks) in beast form stun targets for the duration.

perks.name: Feral Instincts
perks.description: Power attacks in beast form cost 15% less Stamina and do 15% more damage.

perks.name: Improved Bloodthirst
perks.description: Beast form attacks now cause 10 points of bleed damage, healing you for the same amount.

perks.name: Improved Bloodthirst
perks.description: Beast form attacks do an additional 20 points of bleed damage, healing you for the same amount.

perks.name: Swipe
perks.description: Power attacks in beast form can hit multiple targets in front of you.

perks.name: Lycanthropic Speed
perks.description: Movement speed is increased by 15%, both in and out of beast form.

perks.name: Lycanthropic Regen
perks.description: Regenerate 1 health and 0.5% of your Stamina per second, both in and out of beast form.

perks.name: Lycanthropic Regen
perks.description: Regenerate 2 health and 1% of your Stamina per second, both in and out of beast form.

perks.name: Spread the Beastblood
perks.description: Give your follower the beastblood by trading Werebeast Blood with them. No effect on vampires.

perks.name: Gorging
perks.description: The Flesh and blood of the fallen are a welcome feast to you, as they now heal even more of your injuries.

perks.name: Savage Feeding
perks.description: Your stomach has become otherwordly sturdy and now allows you to even feast upon the flesh of more savage things.

perks.name: Night Eye
perks.description: Your eyes have adapted while in beastform, you can now see better in the dark.
